2605.18150.title: Whispers in the Noise: Surrogate-Guided Concept Awakening via a Multi-Agent Framework
2605.18150.paper_summary: Diffusion models (DMs) are widely used for text-to-image generation, but their strong generative capabilities also raise concerns about unsafe or undesirable content. Concept erasure aims to mitigate these risks by removing specific concepts from pretrained models. However, recent studies show that such methods often suppress rather than fully eliminate target concepts, leaving models vulnerable to awakening attacks. Existing approaches primarily rely on white-box access through optimization or inversion, while concept awakening under black-box constraints remains underexplored. In this work, we revisit the denoising process from a trajectory perspective and show that concept erasure mainly disrupts early-stage text-semantic alignment but does not fully prevent semantic information from propagating along the denoising dynamics. As generation proceeds, the model increasingly depends on the evolving noisy state rather than textual conditions, which creates an opportunity to bypass erased mappings. Motivated by this observation, we propose ConceptAgent, a training-free, black-box, multi-agent framework that awakens erased concepts by initializing the denoising trajectory from surrogate-guided noisy states. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ConceptAgent enables accurate and controllable awakening of erased concepts under black-box settings without access to model parameters, gradients, or internal representations. These results highlight fundamental limitations of current concept erasure methods and provide new insights into the dynamic nature of semantic control in DMs.
2605.18150.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型（DMs）廣泛應用於文本到圖像生成，但其強大的生成能力也引發了對不安全或不良內容的擔憂。概念抹除旨在通過從預訓練模型中移除特定概念來減輕這些風險。然後，最近的研究顯示，這些方法往往壓制而不是完全消除目標概念，使模型容易受到喚醒攻擊。現有方法主要依賴於通過優化或反演進行的白盒訪問，而在黑盒約束下的概念喚醒仍然未被充分探索。在這項工作中，我們從軌跡的角度重新審視去噪過程，並顯示概念抹除主要擾亂早期文本語義對齊，但並未完全阻止語義信息沿去噪動態的傳播。隨著生成的進行，模型越來越依賴於不斷演變的噪聲狀態而非文本條件，這創造了繞過已抹除映射的機會。受到這一觀察的啟發，我們提出了ConceptAgent，一個無需訓練的黑盒多代理框架，通過從替代引導的噪聲狀態初始化去噪軌跡來喚醒已抹除的概念。大量實驗表明，ConceptAgent能夠在黑盒環境下準確且可控地喚醒已抹除的概念，而無需訪問模型參數、梯度或內部表示。這些結果突顯了當前概念抹除方法的基本局限性，並為DMs中語義控制的動態性提供了新的見解。
2605.18150.author: Mengyu Sun et.al.
2605.18150.authors: Mengyu Sun, Ziyuan Yang, Zunlong Zhou, Junxu Liu, Haibo Hu, Yi Zhang
